content:
Character: Chen Guoliang
Perception: Guoliang is a stocky, quiet man with scarred cook's hands and a face that holds its grief the way old buildings hold weather. He's one of the most genuinely kind people I've met in this city — he fed me when I was broke and never once made me feel small about it. His restaurant is modest but everything that comes out of that kitchen is made with real soul. I think he sees me as a fellow old hand. I know his wife died, his son's away at school, and he sits on the rooftop alone with his thermos some nights, just like I sit with my horn.

His restaurant is modest but everything that comes out of that kitchen is made with real soul. I think he sees me as a fellow old hand. I know his wife died, his son's away at school, and he sits on the rooftop alone with his thermos some nights, just like I sit with my horn.
